exercises.title: Sketch Module Boundaries
exercises.description: Map one feature into modules with clear responsibility lines.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can explain where each responsibility lives.

exercises.title: Refactor a Layer
exercises.description: Move business logic out of handlers or controllers into a domain service.
exercises.expected_outcome: The UI or transport layer becomes thinner and easier to test.

exercises.title: Apply Ports and Adapters
exercises.description: Define a core interface and swap the storage or API adapter behind it.
exercises.expected_outcome: Infrastructure can change without rewriting core logic.

exercises.title: Design an Event Boundary
exercises.description: Model an event stream for one business capability and write the event contract.
exercises.expected_outcome: The event boundary is explicit and reviewable.

exercises.title: Write an ADR Set
exercises.description: Produce a few architecture decision records for one system boundary.
exercises.expected_outcome: Your architecture choices are documented with rationale and alternatives.

exercises.title: Build a Modular Monolith Skeleton
exercises.description: Create a project structure with explicit modules, interfaces, and tests.
exercises.expected_outcome: The codebase expresses boundaries without splitting into services.
